description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular first-aid kit with rounded edges and a sturdy, hard-shell exterior. The main body is white, encased by a black frame that provides structural support and protection. A prominent black handle is mounted on the top, making it easy to carry, and a gray rotary knob or latch is visible next to the handle, likely for opening the kit. One side of the kit features a large, red cross symbol set against a black circular panel, clearly indicating its emergency medical purpose. The kit stands on four small feet, elevating it slightly above the ground and providing stability when placed on surfaces. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for quick access in urban environments such as public spaces, workplaces, or vehicles.
description: A sturdy, white and black hard-shell first-aid kit with a red cross symbol, handle, and rotary latch for easy carrying and access.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white curved body, black frame, and handle on top, with the rotary latch partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid black panel, handle, and rotary latch, with no cross symbol visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the white body, black frame, and handle, with the rotary latch more clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the red cross symbol on a black circular panel, handle, and rotary latch, clearly marking it as a first-aid kit.
